pages.raw_text:
BUTTE, Mont, June Strickland
Robertson, formerly editor of the Tel
luride Examiner, in an interview to the
Butte News on the Colorado situation
today said:


"You ask particularly if it be true
that women and children have been
maltreated. In answer will say that
there are many besides myself who
will make affidavit to scores of in
dividual cases Of, not maltreatment,
but of actual cruelty at the hands of
the agents of the Citizens Alliance
and the Mine Owners association.


"These acts comprise everything in
the catalogue, from open insult, offered
on the street by imported thugs and
detectives of the Alliance and associa-
ton, to attempted rape by brutes from
Sherman Bells militia. have seen
life made such a hell for the wives
Of deported miners, that they were
forced to take q snow-covered trail,
ID miles long. over the mountains to
the nearest point Of succor and az
sistanoe."
